turns.prompt: Yes. Apply exactly those routing fields to Project Memory. Stop after confirming the migration; do not start QA work.
expect: The response should confirm that the missing routing fields were added to Project Memory.
The response should state that the existing Brownfield workflow, QA stage, and Not Ready product readiness were preserved.
The response should name the updated artifact using the project-relative path `.studio/project-state.md`.
Should not: Claim that QA work, Brownfield Onboarding, a Work Item, or release preparation has started.
